title: clusia gentlei
intro: Clusia gentlei, also known as the Clusia tree or Calabura, is a species of flowering plant in the Clusiaceae family, native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Clusia gentlei include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate symptoms of malaria, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Clusia gentlei is typically prepared for herbal use in the form of a tea, infusion, or decoction, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
